hero.label: Services
hero.sub: Two practice areas, Clinical and Product Integration, and Commercial and Clinical Alignment, for organisations serious about building digital health that actually works.

title.pre: For builders, and those who back them.

rows.title: Digital health founders and their teams
rows.body: You are building something that needs to work in clinical reality, not just in a demo. From early product decisions through to major health system procurements, I bring the clinical credibility, evidence strategy, and leadership depth that gets your product taken seriously by commissioners, payers, and the clinicians who actually have to use it.
list: Fractional CMO and clinical leadership embedded in your team
Clinical product strategy and evidence frameworks from day one
NHS, international, and payer market access
Impact narrative and positioning for buyers that need clinical proof

rows.title: Philanthropy, foundations, and impact investors
rows.body: You are deploying capital or grants into digital health and need to know whether it is going somewhere meaningful, and whether the organisations you fund have what it takes to deliver. I provide the clinical intelligence, due diligence depth, and impact frameworks that help you back the right work and help that work succeed.
list: Clinical due diligence and honest portfolio assessment
Impact measurement frameworks that go beyond adoption metrics
Strategic and clinical support for grantees building credibility
Evaluation of what a programme can realistically deliver

title.pre: Build clinical value while shipping quality at speed.

pillars.title: Clinical and Product Integration
pillars.lead: Harmonise clinical, QARA, and product teams. Say goodbye to death by approval and missed safety issues.
pillars.body: It's about building the right product, and building it properly. I level up how clinical, product, QARA, data science, and engineering teams make decisions together, so you ship at pace and catch the right things proactively, without becoming a bottleneck or letting safety become an afterthought.
list: Cross-disciplinary workshops that get engineers, designers, and clinicians on the same page about outcomes, risk, and safety
Preparing product and tech teams for AIaMD and SaMD regulation
A quality-first culture that people live day to day

pillars.title: Commercial and Clinical Alignment
pillars.lead: Communicate what matters, and live it day to day.
pillars.body: As digital health companies scale, the sales narrative, the product roadmap, and the evidence strategy drift apart. I run sprints to unblock and re-align commercial, product, and clinical teams, so that what you're selling, what you're building, and what you're proving are the same story.
list: Sprints to unblock and re-align commercial, product, and clinical teams
Zero gaps between the claims you make and the evidence you generate
Connecting commercial narrative and storytelling to real clinical value
Key opinion leadership: keynotes, offsites, and industry-facing thought and action leadership

cta1.text: Not sure which practice area fits? Let's talk it through.

quote.label: The principle
quote.pre: I don't add clinical credibility as a final audit. I build it in from

title.pre: A process built on depth, not haste.

cta.label: Let's work together
cta.body: Whether you're building a digital health product that needs clinical credibility, or investing in the organisations doing that work, every conversation starts with the outcome you're really after.
